data.title: Adani Power Secures 2,400 MW Thermal Project in Bihar
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from Adani Power Limited ( (IN:ADANIPOWER) ) is now available.

Adani Power Limited has received a Letter of Award (LoA) for a 2,400 MW thermal power project in Bihar from the Bihar State Power Generation Company Limited. This project, set to be established in Pirpainti, Bhagalpur district, will supply electricity to North and South Bihar Power Distribution Companies over 25 years. The initiative is part of a broader strategy to meet India’s rapidly growing power demand, expected to reach 700+ GW by 2047. The project, which involves an investment of approximately $3 billion, is expected to boost industrialization and economic growth in Bihar, providing affordable and uninterrupted power to the region.

More about Adani Power Limited

Adani Power Limited is India’s largest private sector thermal power generator, focusing on delivering large-scale, reliable, and round-the-clock power. The company is known for its capability to provide dependable capacity at scale and is committed to playing a leading role in securing India’s energy future.

Average Trading Volume: 472,899

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: 2282.5B INR

data.title: Cosmo Lady Reports Decline in Interim Revenue and Profit for 2025
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Cosmo Lady (China) Holdings Co. Ltd. ( (HK:2298) ) just unveiled an update.

Cosmo Lady (China) Holdings Co. Ltd. reported its interim results for the first half of 2025, showing a decline in revenue and profit compared to the same period in 2024. The company faced a decrease in revenue from RMB 1,514,450,000 in 2024 to RMB 1,435,894,000 in 2025, and profit attributable to owners dropped from RMB 82,398,000 to RMB 57,796,000. Despite the challenges, the intimate wear segment showed growth in segment results, while industrial projects and logistics experienced a significant decline. The financial results reflect challenges in managing costs and market conditions, impacting the company’s profitability and earnings per share.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2298) stock is a Buy with a HK$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cosmo Lady (China) Holdings Co. Ltd. stock, see the HK:2298 Stock Forecast page.

More about Cosmo Lady (China) Holdings Co. Ltd.

Cosmo Lady (China) Holdings Co. Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily engaged in the production and sale of intimate wear products. The company operates within the apparel industry and focuses on delivering a variety of intimate wear products to its market.

data.title: Austal Limited Reports Strong Growth and Strategic Wins
data.description:
Austal Limited ( (AUTLF) ) has released its Q4 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Austal Limited presented to its investors.

Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Austal Limited is a global shipbuilding company known for its innovative designs and construction of both commercial and defense vessels, operating primarily in Australia, the United States, the Philippines, and Vietnam. In its latest annual report for 2025, Austal Limited highlighted significant achievements, including a 101% increase in earnings before interest and tax (EBIT) to $113.4 million and a robust order book valued at $13.1 billion. The company secured several new contracts, including a Strategic Shipbuilding Agreement with the Commonwealth of Australia, ensuring a continuous naval shipbuilding program. Austal’s financial performance was bolstered by a 24% increase in total revenue to $1.823 billion and a strong cash balance of $583.9 million, despite substantial capital investments. Looking forward, Austal is well-positioned for sustainable growth, with plans to expand its operational footprint and continue its strategic focus on both defense and commercial shipbuilding sectors.

data.title: SentinelOne Reports Strong Q2 Growth and Revenue
data.description:
Sentinelone, Inc. ( (S) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Sentinelone, Inc. presented to its investors.

Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

SentinelOne, Inc., a leading cybersecurity firm specializing in AI-powered security solutions, has reported its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2026, showcasing significant growth and strategic advancements. The company, known for its innovative platform that integrates AI, data, and security, continues to strengthen its position in the cybersecurity industry.

In its latest earnings report, SentinelOne announced a 22% year-over-year increase in total revenue, reaching $242.2 million. The company also achieved a 24% rise in annualized recurring revenue (ARR), surpassing the $1 billion mark. These results highlight the growing adoption of SentinelOne’s AI-driven platform across various sectors, bolstered by strategic investments and a focus on operational excellence.

Key financial metrics from the report include a GAAP gross margin of 75% and a non-GAAP gross margin of 79%. The company also reported a GAAP operating margin of -33%, an improvement from -40% in the previous year, while the non-GAAP operating margin turned positive at 2%. Additionally, the number of customers with ARR of $100,000 or more increased by 23%, reflecting strong market penetration and demand for SentinelOne’s offerings.

Despite reporting a GAAP net loss margin of -30%, SentinelOne’s non-GAAP net income margin improved to 5%, up from 2% in the previous year. The company’s cash, cash equivalents, and investments totaled $1.2 billion as of July 31, 2025, indicating a robust financial position to support future growth initiatives.

Looking ahead, SentinelOne’s management remains optimistic about the company’s growth trajectory, raising its full-year revenue outlook and reaffirming its commitment to achieving full-year operating profitability and free cash flow. With a strategic focus on innovation and scalability, SentinelOne is well-positioned to capitalize on the expanding demand for advanced cybersecurity solutions.

data.title: Burlington Stores Reports Strong Q2 2025 Earnings
data.description:
Burlington Stores Inc ( (BURL) ) has released its Q2 earnings. Here is a breakdown of the information Burlington Stores Inc presented to its investors.

Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Burlington Stores, Inc., a prominent off-price retailer known for offering high-quality branded apparel, footwear, and home merchandise at competitive prices, has released its financial results for the second quarter of 2025.

The company reported a robust performance with a 10% increase in total sales and a 5% rise in comparable store sales compared to the previous year. Net income reached $94 million, translating to a diluted EPS of $1.47. Notably, the adjusted EPS saw a significant 39% increase to $1.72, driven by improved merchandise margins and reduced freight expenses.

Key financial highlights include a gross margin rate increase to 43.7% and an adjusted EBIT margin improvement of 120 basis points. The company also reported a healthy liquidity position with $1,694 million, comprising cash and available credit. Additionally, Burlington Stores repurchased shares worth $26 million, reflecting confidence in its financial health.

Looking ahead, Burlington Stores has raised its full-year adjusted EPS guidance to between $9.19 and $9.59, indicating optimism about continued growth. The company plans to open approximately 100 new stores and expects total sales to increase by 7% to 8% for the fiscal year 2025.

Overall, Burlington Stores remains focused on its strategic initiatives, including the Burlington 2.0 strategies, which are anticipated to further enhance its long-term performance. The company is maintaining a conservative approach to business management while being prepared to capitalize on market opportunities.
